The catalogue

Unique pieces · one of each
The Cruella archive

Pieces with past lives.

Every pair was worn, loved and forgotten — until we found it. We hunt for what isn’t made anymore: 70s patchwork, Miu Miu and Diesel archive, 90s patent. Carefully photographed, honestly described.

No cart · No waiting · No middlemen

From the catalogue to your wardrobe in three steps.

You talk directly with the person who found the piece. Fast replies, extra photos on request, zero hassle.

1.

Fall for it

Browse the catalogue. Every listing has photos, measurements and the real condition — no surprises.

→
2.

Send a message

Tap "Reserve" — we copy the message for you — and paste it to our Instagram. We reply fast.

→
3.

It’s yours.

MB Way or bank transfer. We ship across Portugal and Europe, carefully packed and tracked.

Open Instagram ↗ The piece is reserved as soon as we reply to your message.

Saw something that has to be yours?

Talk to us on Instagram — that’s where you reserve pieces, ask for more photos and hear about the next drops first.
